creative_brief: Close-up of a hand turning over generic supermarket meat packaging, label deliberately blurred and anonymous. Contrast with a second frame showing a handwritten Bundarra Farm label on butcher paper. Warm, natural light. No text overlay needed.
primary_text:
Rachel Ward was losing money on every kilo of beef she sold through the supermarket supply chain.

Her beef used to disappear into a supply chain that added weeks and thousands of kilometres. The farm name never reached the customer.

FarmThru changed that. Now her beef goes from farm to the Brookvale hub in days. Families trace every cut to her paddock.

No middlemen. Sydney families already collect from the Brookvale hub. We can't promise returns, but we can show you everything.
headline: She raises the beef. You can back it
description: Farm-direct grocery, built by farmers and families. Be part of it.
